recommendations.title: It's Kind of a Funny Story
recommendations.overview: A clinically depressed teenager gets a new start after he checks himself into an adult psychiatric ward.

recommendations.title: Love, Rosie
recommendations.overview: Since the moment they met at age 5, Rosie and Alex have been best friends, facing the highs and lows of growing up side by side. A fleeting shared moment, one missed opportunity, and the decisions that follow send their lives in completely different

recommendations.title: The Cincinnati Kid
recommendations.overview: An up-and-coming poker player tries to prove himself in a high-stakes match against a long-time master of the game.

recommendations.title: Let the Right One In

recommendations.title: Molly's Game
recommendations.overview: Molly Bloom, a young skier and former Olympic hopeful becomes a successful entrepreneur (and a target of an FBI investigation) when she establishes a high-stakes, international poker game.

recommendations.title: Havana
recommendations.overview: During the revolution, a high-stakes gambler arrives in Cuba seeking to win big in poker games. Along the way, he meets and falls in love with the wife of a Communist revolutionary.
